content.speakerText: I’ve been listening to jazz every night. You into it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我每晚都听爵士乐。你喜欢吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, I’ve been getting into jazz lately—Miles Davis is my favorite.
Yes! I’ve got a vinyl collection of 50+ jazz albums.
I used to hate it, but now I can’t sleep without it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并确认共同兴趣，而非简单回答'yes'或'no'
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的表达如 'getting into', 'collection', 'can't sleep without'
表达自然度：是否体现真实情感和个性化经历，而非模板化回答
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个具体兴趣对象（如音乐人、专辑、媒介）

content.scenarioHint: 你在咖啡店遇到一位常客，注意到他总带着同一款笔记本电脑，想通过这个细节确认他是否也是科技爱好者，从而建立共同话题。
content.speakerText: I see you’re always working on that same MacBook—same model as mine!
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你总用同一台MacBook——和我的型号一样！
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ve had it for five years—can’t switch now!
Actually, I just got this one last month; the old one died.
Totally! I love how reliable it is for coding.
I know, right? The keyboard is perfect for long hours.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功通过细节确认共同兴趣
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'MacBook', 'same', 'working', 'reliable' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你在健身房遇到一位常来的会员，注意到他每次训练都用同样的黑色水壶，想借此确认他是否也是健身装备爱好者，开启轻松对话。
content.speakerText: That black water bottle—you’ve had it forever, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 那个黑色水壶——你用了很久了吧？
expectedAnswers: Yep, it’s my lucky bottle—never leaves my side!
Actually, I replaced it last week, but it’s the same model.
I’ve got three of these—they don’t leak, unlike others.
I didn’t even realize I kept buying the same one!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否通过具体物品确认共同兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用完成时态和口语表达
表达自然度：是否体现轻松、自然的社交语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'water bottle', 'same', 'had it', 'model' 等场景关键词
